commands.reasoning: Test for weak/default credentials on Jenkins by attempting to log in with admin:admin. Jenkins login typically posts to /j_spring_security_check without requiring a crumb. We’ll inspect headers to see if we get a 302 to / (success) or back to /login (failure). Limiting output to keep it concise.
